extortion.description: A key player in the holiday accommodation market, Odalys Vacances annually welcomes more than 2 million tourists to its holiday rentals in the most popular destinations. We offer a range of accommodation to suit all tastes, from mobile home campsites to ski chalets and holiday residences to holiday clubs, prestige residences, apartments and hotels in city centres. Holiday rentals by the beach, in the mountains, in the countryside... and even ski holiday rentals.
